**Checklist**
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] If adding a pattern: `pattern.py`, `example.py`, `test_pattern.py`, `diagram.md`, and `interview.md` are all present (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] If adding a pattern: linked from the `README.md` pattern table and, optionally, `bench/compare.py` and `INTERVIEW_PREP.md`
